mapper.sql: id, collection_id, blood_type, blood_amount, expire_date, status, out_unit, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT blood_type, SUM(blood_amount) AS total_amount, COUNT(*) AS record_count FROM blood_stock WHERE blood_type = #{bloodType} AND status = '正常' AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY blood_type
SELECT FROM blood_stock WHERE DATEDIFF(expire_date, CURDATE()) <= #{days} AND status = '正常' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY expire_date ASC

SELECT DATE(create_time) as date, blood_type, SUM(blood_amount) as in_amount FROM blood_stock WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND status IN ('正常', '临期', '已出库') AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY DATE(create_time), blood_type ORDER BY date DESC

SELECT DATE(update_time) as date, blood_type, SUM(blood_amount) as out_amount FROM blood_stock WHERE status = '已出库' AND update_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY DATE(update_time), blood_type ORDER BY date DESC

SELECT bc.id AS collectionId, bt.id AS testId, bt.donor_id AS donorId, d.name AS donorName, d.blood_type AS bloodType, d.phone AS phone, bc.donate_amount AS donateAmount, bc.donate_type AS donateType, bt.recheck_result AS recheckResult, bc.collection_time AS collectionTime, bt.judge_time AS judgeTime FROM blood_test bt INNER JOIN blood_collection bc ON bt.collection_id = bc.id INNER JOIN donor d ON bt.donor_id = d.id LEFT JOIN blood_stock bs ON bt.collection_id = bs.collection_id WHERE bt.blood_status = '合格' AND bs.id IS NULL AND bt.deleted = 0 AND bc.deleted = 0 AND d.deleted = 0
AND d.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND d.blood_type = #{bloodType}
ORDER BY bt.judge_time DESC

SELECT bs.id AS stockId, bs.collection_id AS collectionId, d.id AS donorId, d.name AS donorName, bs.blood_type AS bloodType, bs.blood_amount AS bloodAmount, bs.expire_date AS expireDate, bs.status AS status, bs.create_time AS createTime, bc.donate_type AS donateType FROM blood_stock bs INNER JOIN blood_collection bc ON bs.collection_id = bc.id INNER JOIN donor d ON bc.donor_id = d.id WHERE bs.status IN ('正常', '临期', '已过期') AND bs.deleted = 0 AND bc.deleted = 0 AND d.deleted = 0
AND d.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND bs.blood_type = #{bloodType}
ORDER BY bs.create_time DESC

SELECT bs.id AS stockId, bs.collection_id AS collectionId, d.id AS donorId, d.name AS donorName, bs.blood_type AS bloodType, bs.blood_amount AS bloodAmount, bc.donate_type AS donateType, bs.expire_date AS expireDate, bs.out_unit AS outUnit, bs.create_time AS createTime, bs.update_time AS updateTime FROM blood_stock bs INNER JOIN blood_collection bc ON bs.collection_id = bc.id INNER JOIN donor d ON bc.donor_id = d.id WHERE bs.deleted = 0 AND bc.deleted = 0 AND d.deleted = 0 ORDER BY bs.create_time DESC

SELECT bs.id AS stockId, bs.collection_id AS collectionId, d.id AS donorId, d.name AS donorName, bs.blood_type AS bloodType, bs.blood_amount AS bloodAmount, bc.donate_type AS donateType, bs.expire_date AS expireDate, bs.out_unit AS outUnit, bs.create_time AS createTime, bs.update_time AS updateTime FROM blood_stock bs INNER JOIN blood_collection bc ON bs.collection_id = bc.id INNER JOIN donor d ON bc.donor_id = d.id WHERE bs.status = '已出库' AND bs.deleted = 0 AND bc.deleted = 0 AND d.deleted = 0 ORDER BY bs.update_time DESC
